name: Cyberdark Wurm
name_jp: サイバー・ダーク・ヴルム
desc: This card's name becomes "Cyber Dragon" while on the field or in the GY. If this card is in your hand or GY, and you have another Machine "Cyber" monster in your field or GY: You can send 1 "Cyber Dragon" monster from your hand or Deck to the GY; Special Summon this card, then you can add 1 "Cyber" Spell/Trap from your GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Cyberdark Wurm" once per Duel.
mnst_eff: This card's name becomes "Cyber Dragon" while on the field or in the GY. If this card is in your hand or GY, and you have another Machine "Cyber" monster in your field or GY: You can send 1 "Cyber Dragon" monster from your hand or Deck to the GY; Special Summon this card, then you can add 1 "Cyber" Spell/Trap from your GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Cyberdark Wurm" once per Duel.
eff: This card's name becomes "Cyber Dragon" while on the field or in the GY. If this card is in your hand or GY, and you have another Machine "Cyber" monster in your field or GY: You can send 1 "Cyber Dragon" monster from your hand or Deck to the GY; Special Summon this card, then you can add 1 "Cyber" Spell/Trap from your GY to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Cyberdark Wurm" once per Duel.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
stat_change: Changes own name while in the GY
Changes own name while on the field
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
